title: Glick Red Curling Ribbon, for Wrapping, Arts and Crafts, and Other Celebrations Gift Bow for Presents (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Luxury Curling Ribbon for use in Gift Wrapping
Suitable for birthdays, christmas, bridal showers, gender reveal, thank you gifts, gift baskets and in gift bags
The dimensions of this beautiful ribbon is 5mm x 20m
You will find everything you need in our range of quality printed gift wrap, tags, bags, rolls and tissue
description: From the manufacturer Glick Our product range includes innovative high quality printed Gift Wrap, Gift Tags, Gift Bags, Roll Wrap, Ribbons, Bows, Tissue Papers and Stationery for all seasons and occasions. About Us Our Customers include some of the world’s top Departmental Stores and Boutiques as well as Gift and Card Shops across the UK and worldwide . We are based in Bradford, West Yorkshire.
